reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio excelente! Todo impecable. Muy buena atención del personal y del encargado, realmente 5☆.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station! Everything was spotless. Very good service from the staff and the manager, truly 5 stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMmEzRFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo perfecto como siempre

(Translated by Google)
Everything was perfect as always.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMmFTWDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena como en casi todas las YPF, sugiero solamente que el shop debería estar abierto 24 ha en temporada de verano

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, as in almost all YPF stations. I would only suggest that the shop should be open 24 hours during the summer season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNlktXzNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar combustible, lo unico que me parecio deplorable es que te cobren para cargar aire a las cubiertas ... de rata me parecio

(Translated by Google)
Good place to fill up, the only thing I found deplorable was that they charge you to inflate the tires... I thought that was cheap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJX3FuemV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables en combustibles y en la cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly at the fuel station and in the cafeteria.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcnEyOHJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y ubicación! Una de las.pocas estaciones de servicio de la zona que tiene todo!

(Translated by Google)
Great service and location! One of the few gas stations in the area that has everything!
